name: Shanghai Fudan Forward S&T Co., Ltd
summary: Shanghai Fudan Forward S&T Co., Ltd operates in software development, bio-medicine, real estate, and other businesses. It develops and exports software to Japan; and researches, develops, produces, and sells Chinese medicines, chemical medicines, and genetic engineering drugs, as well as geriatric medicines, cardio-cerebral vascular drugs, anti-tumor drugs, and other products. It is also involved in the development of high-tech parks; and development, production, and sale of uninterruptible power supply and VRLA battery products, as well as professional agent of car audio brand. In addition, the company provides investment consulting, market research, venture capital investment, private equity investment consulting, and marketing solutions. Shanghai Fudan Forward S&T Co., Ltd was founded in 1984 and is based in Shanghai, China.
